title: SAP India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SAP India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
